block_01: The past two months have been a period of uncertainty for Bitcoin. The overall hype around it has gone down, but what if the current situation on Bitcoin – a chance to take first-row seats in a space rocket to the moon? Or will the crypto price fall?
block_02: The recent growth of its price (from $3 800 in March to $10 000 in June) gave traders multiple opportunities. Now crypto traders are waiting for the next trend.
